key_metrics_output: particle counts, particle types, chemical identification via IR spectroscopy (FTIR, LDIR imaging, or equivalent)

particle_size_range: designed to distinguish plastic particles in water that range in size from 20 µm-5 mm
key_metrics_output: visual microscopy for particle counts and infrared (IR) spectroscopy for chemical identification of counted particles
IR spectroscopy can include, but is not limited to, Fourier transform IR (FTIR), laser direct infrared (LDIR) imaging, and other techniques
abstract: This test method provides for the identification and quantification of microplastic particles in municipal raw wastewater influent, treated effluent from a wastewater treatment plant, ambient waters, finished drinking water, and bottled water.
